# Contributing to SentinelX WebShell

Pull requests and issues are welcome.

## PR Checklist

- [ ] Test your changes locally before submitting
- [ ] Follow existing code style (no comments, concise, minimal)
- [ ] PHP: ensure `php -l` passes
- [ ] JS: ensure `node -c` passes
- [ ] Python: ensure `python3 -m py_compile` passes
- [ ] Perl: ensure `perl -c` passes

## Code Style

- No comments in implant files
- Dark/cyberpunk theme for UI additions
- No emoji
- English variable names
- Keep payloads self-contained (no external dependencies)

## Adding a Feature

1. Open an issue first to discuss
2. Fork the repo
3. Create a feature branch
4. Submit a PR

## Reporting Bugs

Include the error message, PHP/Node/Python version, and steps to reproduce.
